body:
This PR adds in a test case showing a coupled atmos, land, ocean, and sea ice model. The bucket model in place of the slab land model, which is how it differs from https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/50.

We've also set it up so that the specific humidity at the surface uses the correct land value, and set the RRTMGP fields for surface temp and albedo correctly based on the surface values.

A future PR will update the version of ClimaAtmos we are using so that we can read the precipitation from the atmos cache, and pass it to the land model, and so that we are using topography in the atmos model.

A future PR will also implement a coupler interface as this interface is currently hard coded to some extent to the models being used here.

co-authors:
Ben Mackay @jb-mackay
Lenka Novak @LenkaNovak
Zhao-yi Shen @szy21
Charlie @charleskawczynski
title: Bucket2.0
